text: about the size of a house cat this wily
little creature is the smallest fox
found in the u.s
but even at five pounds they are the
largest land mammal on the channel
islands off the coast of california
this is the island fox
[Music]
island foxes are descendants of mainland
grey foxes but have grown smaller over
thousands of years to adapt to the
limited resources of their island homes
in recent years a chain of events caused
these little foxes to be federally
listed as endangered
bald eagles once lived harmoniously with
the island fox never considering them as
food
but then the less forgiving golden
eagles arrived in the channel islands
and began preying upon the island fox
hunting them to near extinction
but through a recovery program the
golden eagles were relocated and the
island fox population is on the rise
again
this is the island fox
[Music]
you
